positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of three overlapping abstract mountain peaks under a vibrant, crescent moon and scattered constellations. The style should be deep forest linocut woodblock print combined with modern vector graphic elements. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast between the deep indigo sky and the solid black peaks. Use a limited, nature-inspired palette: earthy moss green, cream beige, and rich midnight blue. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed to function flawlessly as a repeating, single-color screen print on fabric. Isolated, graphic, clean lines, no gradients.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, signature, messy, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealistic, gradient, photo, realism
